hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("database-manager/migrations")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Write to database-manager/migrations is blocked. Manage migration files manually."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("package-lock\\.json")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Write to package-lock.json is blocked. This file is managed automatically by npm."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

PreToolUse.command: jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("\\.env")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env files contain secrets and must not be edited by AI."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("CHANGELOG\\.md")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CHANGELOG.md is generated automatically by the release tooling."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("(^|/)dist/")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"dist/ contains build artifacts and must not be edited manually."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("(^|/)coverage/")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"coverage/ contains generated test reports and must not be edited manually."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0
